note: Estimated figures based on known algorithmic costs. Token bucket and sliding window benchmarks match expected O(1) mutex-bound performance. Distributed benchmark estimates a 0.5ms loopback RTT to Redis.

results.note: estimated — Mutex acquisition dominates, not arithmetic
estimated — atomic CAS slightly costlier than plain Mutex
estimated — network round-trip dominates even on loopback (~0.5ms)
estimated — acceptable for APIs with >5ms response time
100 req at T=59.9s + 100 req at T=60.1s = 200 req in 0.2s against a 100/min limit
sliding window always sees the full 60s history — no boundary advantage
